privileged_info_summary: The task involves refactoring a Maven project (iot-device-manager) with Java 17 and JUnit 5.9.2. The SmartHomeDevice class has 7 private final fields (id, name, ipAddress, macAddress, firmwareVersion, location, isActive) exposed through a public constructor and 7 getters. DeviceService has 2 methods creating instances via the constructor, and DeviceServiceTest has 2 test methods. The task requires refactoring the 7-parameter constructor to use the Builder pattern, updating both DeviceService and DeviceServiceTest to use the new Builder API, and ensuring compilation and test passage. All data is synthetic, generated by setup_task.sh.
